rules.title: Seller must ensure item complies with Shopee policies and Singapore law
rules.guidance: Before listing, verify that the item is allowed on Shopee SG and that the seller can provide any required local compliance documentation.

rules.title: Avoid exaggerated or unverifiable performance claims
rules.guidance: Do not claim super suction, industrial-grade power, guaranteed deep clean, wet/dry use, HEPA filtration, or other unsupported performance statements unless supplier evidence exists.

rules.title: Electrical, USB-powered, or rechargeable products need human safety review
rules.guidance: For USB rechargeable electrical products, verify supplier safety information, charging details, battery specs, plug/cable contents, warranty terms, and any applicable Singapore consumer-safety requirements before launch.

rules.title: Counterfeit or IP-infringing goods are prohibited
rules.guidance: Reject listings that use protected brands, logos, cartoon characters, or misleading branded packaging without authorization.

rules.title: Recalled, unsafe, or illegal items must not be listed
rules.guidance: Block any source product with known recall, unsafe battery behavior, damaged electrical components, or missing essential safety information.
